examples: Listen to a conversation between a student and a counselor at the University Counseling Center.
The ability to relate well with their student is something a counselor should possess, not a teacher.
The ability to relate well with their students is something a counselor should possess, not a teacher.
The guidance counselor told me I should look forward to a career as a day laborer.
Ms. FRAN DRAKE (School Counselor, Orange Beach Elementary School): We include a Friday night meal.
